summary: Implemented auction room live chat: all logged-in users (seller, bidders, spectators) can chat during session; chat stays open until 5 minutes after auction endTime then closes. Backend: Auction_Chat_Messages table, REST + WebSocket, AuctionRoomChat frontend component wired into auction-room page.
current_status: Auction live chat feature complete. User must restart backend to create DB table via DataSeeder. Frontend hot-reloads on save.
